name: Imperator Vandal
description: The Imperator Vandal has been customized by the Tenno with a blue-green metallic finish and Lotus branding on the barrel.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Imperator Vandal has been customized by the Tenno with a blue-green metallic finish and Lotus branding on the barrel.

components.name: Tellurium
components.description:
This rare metal is foreign to the Origin System and can only be found in asteroids that have made the long journey from other stars.

Location: Archwing Missions on Uranus

patchlogs.name: Update 31.5: Angels of the Zariman
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Imperator Vandal preview not showing up in the Codex if you do not own it.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: Hotfix 27.3.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed high GPU Effects time when shooting Profit Taker's legs with the Imperator Vandal.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed scaling issue with the Imperator Vandal’s muzzle smoke FX in Railjack missions.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Kuva Lich Changes 27.1.0 + 27.1.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Improved performance when using the Imperator Vandal in Railjack.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.12 + 27.0.12.1
patchlogs.changes: Removed the hit-scan tracers from Imperator Vandal as it's now a projectile weapon.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Imperator Vandal not rendering properly as an Arch Gun when using certain Skins or no Skin.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.11
patchlogs.changes: Returned the Imperator Vandal Critical Chance to 15% and Status Chance to 10% in Archwing mode.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.6
patchlogs.changes: Fixed the Imperator and Imperator Vandal reload sounds playing non-positional.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.17.1 - 22.17.1.1
patchlogs.changes:
Imperator Vandal Barrel          Uncommon (11.28%)
Imperator Vandal Receiver     Uncommon (11.28%)
Imperator Vandal Blueprint     Common (38.72%)

patchlogs.name: Update 18.12.0: Vauban Prime & 18.12.1
patchlogs.changes:
•    Imperator Vandal parts are now tradable!
The Imperator Vandal Blueprint is now tradable.

patchlogs.name: Update 15.10.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Imperator Vandal not displaying proper energy display color.
